channel.title: Smit Parekh - Digital Marketing & Full-stack Developer
channel.description: Welcome to Smit Parekh's portfolio. Discover my skills in digital marketing, web development, SEO, and video editing. Explore my projects and services that can elevate your brand's online presence.

item.title: Smit Parekh - Digital Marketing & Full-stack Developer
item.description: Welcome to Smit Parekh's portfolio. Discover my skills in digital marketing, web development, SEO, and video editing. Explore my projects and services that can elevate your brand's online presence.

item.title: About - Marketing Manager & Full-stack Developer | Smit Parekh
item.description: Discover Smit Parekh, a Marketing Manager & Back-end Developer with over 3 years of experience, 10+ certifications, and a blend of strategic, creative, and technical skills.

item.title: Smit Parekh - Skills in Web Development, Digital Marketing & Creative Design
item.description: Smit Parekh - Skills in Web Development, Digital Marketing & Creative Design

item.title: Smit Parekh - Qualifications in Marketing, Development, and IT Education
item.description: Discover Smit Parekh's qualifications, including a Master’s and Bachelor’s in Information Technology from Charusat University, and experience as a Marketing Manager, Node.js Developer, and Video Editor.

item.title: Smit Parekh - Professional Services: Web Development, SEO, Marketing & More
item.description: Explore a range of professional services by Smit Parekh, including Full Stack Web Development, SEO Optimization, Digital Marketing Strategy, Social Media Marketing, Video Editing, and Graphic Design. Tailored to elevate your brand's digital presence.

item.title: Smit Parekh - Portfolio of Projects: Web Development, SEO, Digital Marketing & More
item.description: Explore the diverse portfolio of Smit Parekh, showcasing projects in SEO Optimization, Digital Marketing, Web Development, Video Editing, and Graphic Design. Discover innovative solutions tailored for various clients.

item.title: Client Testimonials - Smit Parekh
item.description: Read what clients say about Smit Parekh's web development and digital marketing services. Discover how his expertise has transformed businesses.

item.title: Contact Us - Smit Parekh
item.description: Get in touch with Smit Parekh for web development, digital marketing, and SEO services. Reach out via phone or email for inquiries.

item.title: Background Remover | Free Image Background Removal Tool
item.description: Use our free background remover tool to easily remove the background from your images. Upload your image and download the background-free version in seconds!
